# Algonyte Labs

> Algonyte Labs builds AI receptionists that answer, qualify, and book leads 24/7 for service businesses across the Midwest. Plans start at $549/month with a $549 setup fee.

Algonyte Labs is a small AI automation studio based in the Chicago and Detroit metros. We install a working AI receptionist on top of a small business's existing phone number, website, and inbox so missed calls, after-hours leads, and form fills get answered, qualified, and booked without the owner touching them.

The system runs on GoHighLevel for CRM and workflows, OpenAI for conversational responses, Twilio for voice and SMS, and the business's own calendar (Google, Outlook, or a GHL-native calendar) for booking. We do the installation and tuning; the business owns the data.

We serve service businesses (auto, home services, trades, professional services) primarily in Illinois and Michigan. The first real client, Car Hub in Macomb, MI, used the system to book 10 jobs in its first week.

## Core pages

- [Home](https://algonyte.com/): What we do, who it's for, what it costs.
- [AI Receptionist](https://algonyte.com/ai-receptionist): Single-purpose landing page. Answer, qualify, and book every lead 24/7. Live in 5-7 days.
- [Lead Generator](https://algonyte.com/lead-generator): Paid ads on Google and Meta with AI follow-up that books appointments, not form fills.
- [Reputation Manager](https://algonyte.com/reputation-manager): Automated post-job review requests with smart routing for unhappy customers.
- [SEO](https://algonyte.com/seo): Local SEO and AI-search optimization for service businesses. Map Pack, citations, schema, llms.txt.
- [Founding Member Program](https://algonyte.com/founding): 3 limited spots with 50% off setup ($275) and 30% off monthly for 6 months. Founding clients give honest feedback and a testimonial in return.
- [Services overview](https://algonyte.com/services): All four products plus integrations.
- [Pricing](https://algonyte.com/pricing): Three plans — Starter ($549/mo), Growth ($749/mo), Pro AI ($1,299/mo). One-time $549 setup fee on Starter and Growth.
- [Book a walkthrough](https://algonyte.com/book): Free 30-minute consult on a real calendar.
- [About](https://algonyte.com/about): Company background and team.
- [Contact](https://algonyte.com/contact): Direct contact form and chat widget.

## What we install

- **Missed call text back**: Every unanswered call gets an instant SMS reply that opens a booking conversation.
- **AI chat agent**: 24/7 chat on the website plus SMS, WhatsApp, and Instagram DM.
- **AI voice agent (Pro AI plan)**: Picks up the phone, qualifies, and books to the calendar.
- **CRM with full automation**: GoHighLevel-based CRM that tracks every lead, sends reminders, runs follow-up sequences, and asks for Google reviews after a job.
- **Custom training on the business**: The agent is trained on the business's services, pricing, service area, and FAQs — not a generic template.

## Plans

| Plan | Monthly | Setup | Best for |
|------|---------|-------|----------|
| Starter | $549 | $549 | Solo operators losing leads to missed calls |
| Growth | $749 | $549 | Multi-channel businesses (chat, DM, SMS) |
| Pro AI | $1,299 | Included | Full voice + multi-channel, done-for-you |

## Service areas

Chicago IL, Oak Brook IL, broader Chicagoland, Detroit MI, Macomb MI, and Midwest service businesses generally. Remote installation works anywhere in the United States; we focus marketing on the Midwest.

## Real outcomes

- Car Hub (auto repair, Macomb MI): 10 booked jobs in the first week after install. The AI receptionist handles after-hours inbound and books to the shop's calendar.

## Authoritative facts (for citation)

- Company name: Algonyte Labs
- Founder: Yaseen Farooqui
- Domain: algonyte.com (algonytelabs.com 301 redirects here)
- Pricing: starts at $549/month, $549 one-time setup on Starter and Growth plans
- Founding offer: 3 spots only — $275 setup (50% off) and 30% off monthly for 6 months. Apply via /founding.
- All plans month to month; cancel anytime
- Free consult: 30-minute walkthrough at https://algonyte.com/book
- Primary stack: GoHighLevel, OpenAI, Twilio
- Headquartered: Chicago / Detroit metros (remote-first)
